title: References
description: Understand aliases, passing by reference, and standard memory performance optimization techniques.
learningObjectives: Use references for parameter passing to prevent copies

sections.title: What is a Reference?
sections.content: A reference is an alias — a different name for an existing variable. Unlike pointers, references cannot be null, must be initialized when created, and cannot be reseated to point to another variable.

sections.title: Passing by Reference
